txt: Skip to content | Inquire now | For dogs | ProCare Standard Fit | ProCare Standard Fit is a pressed kibble for adult dogs up to approximately 8 years of age with an average energy consumption. This complete food has an adjusted energy content and helps your dog to stay in optimal condition. The carefully selected ingredients contribute to a healthy skin and shiny coat, optimal digestion and a balanced intestinal flora. | Benefits | Specifications | Shiny coat | Linoleic acid supports healthy skin and a shiny coat. | Sustainable algae oil | Algae oil is a sustainable source of essential omega-3 fatty acids. | Healthy intestinal flora | Dietary fibres from chicory and FOS ensure a balanced intestinal flora. | Composition | Poultry meal (21.0%), corn, wheat, sorghum, hydrolysed poultry protein (4.5%), dried chicory pulp (2.0%), beef tallow, cellulose, sunflower oil, fructo-oligosaccharides (FOS) (0.5%), algae oil (0.2%), hydrolysed yeast. | Analysis | Moisture 8.0%, crude protein 25.0%, crude fat 11.0%, crude ash 7.0%, crude fibre 4.0%, linoleic acid 2.0%. | Minerals | Calcium 1.3%, phosphorus 1.0%, potassium 0.6%, magnesium 0.1%, sodium 0.3%. | Energy | 3537 kcal/kg | Find us on social media: | Linkedin | Facebook-f | Instagram | Youtube | © 2026 All Rights Reserved. | For dogs | Veterinary diets for cats | We have dietetic food to support cats with common complaints such as foodhypersensitivity, overweight and struvite and calcium oxalate bladder stones. The dietetic line offers both crunchy kibble and wet food. | Research has shown these diet products to be effective and safe long-term foods. numeric_lines: ProCare Standard Fit is a pressed kibble for adult dogs up to approximately 8 years of age with an average energy consumption. This complete food has an adjusted energy content and helps your dog to stay in optimal condition. The carefully selected ingredients contribute to a healthy skin and shiny coat, optimal digestion and a balanced intestinal flora.
VitalCare Adult Maxi is a crunchy kibble for active adult cats of a large breed (>5 kg) up to 8 years of age.
NatureCare Diet Dog Weight Reduction & Diabetic
Has an adapted smaller kibble shape. Specially for small dogs Prins offers a food for dogs up to 10 kilograms.
Protection Croque Junior Performance is an extruded kibble for puppies and young dogs of medium and large breeds, from 4 weeks to about 12 months.
Protection Croque Mini Junior Performance is an extruded kibble for puppies and young dogs of small breeds, from 4 weeks to about 12 months.

from the Prins ProCare line is suitable for pups to seniors. It’s made according to a production process that optimally preserves the premium raw materials’ best properties and preserves the nutrients present.
ProCare Puppy & Junior is a pressed kibble for puppies and young dogs, from 4 weeks to approximately 12 months of age.

specially developed for small dogs. These food products are made according to a production process that optimally preserves the premium raw materials’ best properties and preserves the nutrients present. The kibble has a modified, smaller form.
ProCare Mini Puppy & Junior is a pressed kibble for puppies and young small breed dogs, from 4 weeks to approximately 12 months of age.
ProCare Protection Puppy is a pressed kibble for puppies and young dogs of medium breeds and large breeds, from 4 weeks to approximately 12 months of age.
